messages.settings.plugins.permissions.description: Review the permissions below before enabling this plugin.
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.read.label: Read files
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.read.descri: Allows the plugin to read note contents and browse files in the active workspace.
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.write.label: Write files
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.write.descr: Allows the plugin to create or modify files in the active workspace.
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.editor.desc: Allows the plugin to read editor content and insert text at the current cursor position.
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.process.des: Allows the plugin to start local processes inside the active workspace through the host broker.
messages.settings.plugins.permissions.external.de: Allows the plugin to open external URLs and ask you to pick files outside the active workspace.
